tasks.instruction: Book the earliest available in‑person new‑patient dermatology appointment within the next 14 days for a teen with acne on a weekday afternoon (after 3:00 PM), and complete the scheduling process.

target_names: New teen acne visit with Amelia Park, MD at Downtown San Francisco Dermatology Clinic on 2026-03-04 at 3:30 PM

tasks.instruction: From the cosmetic services list, filter to 60‑minute treatments costing at most $250, open the first two results sorted by lowest price, and submit a consultation request for whichever of those two is cheaper.

tasks.instruction: From the adult skin conditions list, choose a condition whose name starts with the letter “P,” save it to your personal care plan using the option for people who have already been diagnosed, and then open it from your care plan dashboard.

tasks.instruction: Using the insurance tools, select an accepted silver‑tier HMO plan from the HealthSure provider and run a cost estimate for a full‑body skin cancer screening, filtering for visits with estimated patient cost under $75, then open the pricing details for the first location in the filtered list.

tasks.instruction: Find a dermatologist who specializes in pediatric care, treats eczema in children under age 10, and save that doctor to your favorites, then search the education resources for an article about eczema in children and save the first matching article to your favorites as well.

target_names: Eczema in Children: Practical Tips for Parents
